dialogue_text: But I shall have to cut a hole in your breast, so I can put your heart in the right place. I hope it won't hurt you.
source_excerpt: "Very well," answered the little man. "But I shall have to cut a hole in your breast, so I can put your heart in the right place. I hope it won't hurt you."
